About MHC

A New Kind of
Consulting Group

Maitreya Hinde Consultations (MHC) is Goa's emerging multi-vertical consulting and business group — a central strategy, execution and consulting hub that identifies opportunities, builds ventures and drives growth across industries.

Headquartered in Bicholim, Goa, MHC operates 8 distinct business verticals — from premium academic coaching and government exam training to solar energy, wellness, technology and community outreach — with a 100% pass rate from Class 6 to 12.

Each vertical operates with defined leadership, clear purpose and measurable impact — while MHC provides the strategic direction, partnerships and execution framework that enables every arm to grow.
01
Strategic Growth
Building businesses with long-term vision and disciplined execution.
02
Community Impact
Every vertical serves the communities of Bicholim and Sattari.
03
Expert Partnerships
Bodhi Academy, Dr. Shetye, Smart Solar and beyond.
04
Operational Excellence
Defined roles, clear accountability and cross-vertical coordination.
Bicholim · Goa

Our Portfolio

8 Verticals.
One Vision.

Like Alphabet's portfolio of companies, MHC's verticals operate independently yet share a common strategic foundation — growth, community impact and long-term value creation in Goa.

01
Hinde Academy
Education · Classes 4–12 · JEE · NEET
Premier coaching institution delivering structured academic excellence for Classes 4–12. Board preparation, foundation programs, science stream and expert faculty for JEE and NEET.
Manoj Hinde
9 members
↗
02
MHC Scholars
Premium Mentorship · High Performance
Exclusive high-performance mentorship program for academically ambitious students. Individual tracking, parent engagement, career planning and personalised coaching.
Dr. Namrata Prabhu Hinde
2 members
↗
03
💻
MHC Digital
Technology · Web · Apps · IT Consulting
Full-service digital agency delivering web, apps, IT consulting and automation. Led by Maitreya Hinde with 10+ years IT experience and a remote team of 4 specialists.
Maitreya Hinde
4 members
↗
04
MHC Green
Clean Energy · Solar Solutions · Goa
Solar energy solutions for homes and businesses across Goa — client acquisition, technical consultation and installation oversight driving energy independence.
Ibrahim Shaikh
1 member
↗
05
MHC Vitals
Wellness · Nutrition · Lifestyle
Holistic wellness consultations combining nutrition planning, lifestyle coaching and student wellness integration for high-performance living.
Dr. Namrata Prabhu Hinde
1 member
↗
06
Dr. Shetye Foundation
Community · Free Govt. Exam Training
Sponsored community education initiative offering free GSSC and GPSC government exam training to youth of Bicholim. 300+ students enrolled. Sponsored by Dr. Chandrakant P. Shetye, MLA Bicholim.
Maitreya Hinde
3 members
↗
07
Mindcraft by MHC
Media · Podcast · Brand Building
A media and content brand exploring mindset, entrepreneurship, success and life. Fully owned and hosted by Maitreya Hinde — building the MHC brand through authentic storytelling.
Maitreya Hinde
1 member
↗
08
MHC Connect
Community · Schools · Social Initiative
Community development initiative offering free workshops, Vedic classes, mentorship and student counselling to schools across Bicholim and Sattari — empowering institutions and students.
Maitreya Hinde
1 member

Maitreya Hinde
Director · Founder
Leadership

Maitreya
Hinde

"Building ventures that serve communities and create lasting value in Goa."
— Maitreya Hinde, Director
Maitreya Hinde is the Founder and Director of MHC — a technology professional with 10+ years of IT sector experience, academic entrepreneur and community builder based in Bicholim, Goa.

As the founder of Hinde Academy and academic partner of The Bodhi Academy, Maitreya has personally mentored hundreds of students, achieving 100% pass rates from Class 6 to 12 and producing board toppers year after year.

His vision: build a diversified consulting group that creates real impact in Goa — from education to solar to technology and community outreach.
10+ Years IT & Technology

JEE & NEET Expert Faculty

Podcast Host — Mindcraft
